cloud_service: AcmeSign Pro - Cloud-based document management and e-signature platform
pilot_modifications: During the Pilot Period, SLA commitments do not apply
other_fee_structure: Usage-based pricing for API calls exceeding 10,000 per month at $0.01 per call
use_limitations: Service may only be used within the United States and Canada
technical_support: Email and chat support during business hours, Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 5 PM ET
sla_description: 99.9% uptime guarantee measured monthly; service credits for downtime exceeding target
professional_services_description: Implementation, data migration, and user training services per SOW #1
jurisdiction: courts located in New Castle County, Delaware
provider_warranty_description: Provider warrants 99.9% uptime for the Cloud Service
customer_warranty_description: Customer warrants compliance with all applicable data protection laws
security_policy_description: SOC 2 Type II certified; annual penetration testing; ISO 27001 compliant
insurance_description: $5,000,000 commercial general liability; $2,000,000 cyber liability; $1,000,000 E&O
